meaning: adj.毛皮的,盖着毛皮的,有锅垢的,有舌苔的
examples: Snowshoes are not like thick furry shoes designed to keep the feet warm.
They wash and wax the cars, go on and on about them—some even adorn them with furry dice.
Scientific experiments have demonstrated incredible ways to kill a guinea pig, a small furry animal.
Their results indicate that all placental mammals arose from a small, furry, insect-eating animal.
The team set the cyber-rat loose on two different groups of the furry subjects.
